description:
Two server actions that create and reset deterministic
`hr.applicant` test fixtures (prefixed "TEST_FIXTURE_") in
non-production environments. Use these to validate the recruitment
pipeline end-to-end without polluting real applicant data.

Both SAs are bound to the hr.applicant Action menu (form + list)
so they're one click away in Recruitment.

Fixtures created (6 applicants, one per pipeline state we want
to exercise):
 - Stage 1 + no attachment + fresh                → 005 resume gate path
 - Stage 1 + no attachment + backdated 3d         → 009 SMS-flagging path
 - Stage 2 + no completed info survey + fresh    → 006 info dispatch path
 - Stage 2 + no completed info survey + backdated → 009 reminder cascade
 - Stage 7 + 1 of 3 assessments done + backdated  → 010 partial-bundle path
 - Stage 7 + 0 assessments done + backdated      → 010 full-bundle path

Each fixture gets a unique Mailinator inbox so emails can be
inspected without setting up real mailboxes:
  bicc-fixture-<suffix>@mailinator.com

Production guard: the seed SA reads web.base.url and refuses if it
matches production (`bicc.odoo.com` with no dev/ph2 marker). The
reset SA is unguarded (keyed by the TEST_FIXTURE_ prefix — no risk
of touching real applicants).

Re-runnable: existing TEST_FIXTURE_* rows are reset to a clean
starting state rather than duplicated (idempotent).

Not seeded: pass/fail variants (scoring_success is a stored compute
driven by actual survey scoring — can't be set via API). Those
paths need a real browser walk-through.
